description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can with a classic Pepsi branding, featuring a bold red, white, and blue color scheme. The front displays the iconic Pepsi logo in blue and red on a white background, with a vertical blue stripe running down the side. The can has a metallic sheen and a smooth, slightly reflective surface, typical of beverage cans. On the reverse side, there is a detailed nutrition facts label printed in black on a white background. The top of the can is silver with a standard pull-tab opening, and the overall form is seamless with no visible handle. This object is commonly found in urban environments such as streets, parks, and vending machines.
description: A metallic Pepsi can with red, white, and blue branding, smooth surface, and a nutrition label on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Pepsi logo prominently on a white background with red and blue accents.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the nutrition facts label and partial Pepsi logo.
description_view_2: Angled view showing the transition between the nutrition label and the logo, with more of the red and white visible.
description_view_3: Rear view with the blue vertical stripe and partial logo, less text visible.
